name: mvs-monthly-value-sniper
description: MVS — Monthly Value Sniper v8.2. KuCoin API for Ghana. Two-timeframe (4H bias + 15min entry, scanned every 45min), 4 symbols, POC+VAH+VAL+FIBO, zero lagging indicators. Sized to fit GitHub Actions free-tier minutes on a private repo. Phone + Laptop + GitHub Actions deployment ready.
author: Abdin
